title: Enhanced Biomes Music
description: Improves soundtrack playback in biomes, adds an Intelligent Playback System in Mountain and Cave biomes — something that was so missing in Minecraft. Check out the description to see what else the mod improves.
body:
> **Mod improves the SoundTracks in Minecraft biomes with an intelligent playback system. Specifically, these biomes are: Stony Peaks, Jagged Peaks, Frozen Peaks, Grove, Snowy Slopes, Dripstone Caves, Lush Caves and Deep Dark. Each of these biomes has its own delay before the music starts playing. After the music finishes playing, all other biomes with a delay (1–20 seconds) are blocked for a certain period of time so that the music doesn't become repetitive.**


<details>
<summary>Intelligent Playback System:</summary>
  
> **How it works** - **_The first time you enter these biomes, the music will start playing after 1–20 seconds, depending on which biome you are in. After the music for these biomes ends, it will not play again after 1–20 seconds upon re-entering the biomes for a certain period of time, so that the music does not become tiresome. Enjoy the views of these biomes along with the music!_**

-  ### Biomes where this Intelligent Playback System works:

> **Lockouts appear only if the 1–20 second delays have actually triggered in these biomes. To explain in more detail: suppose a 5‑second delay triggers in the Dripstone Caves. Then, after the music ends — and only if the music actually played specifically because of that 5‑second delay — a 34‑minute lockout is created for other cave and mountain biomes, as well as for the Dripstone Caves themselves. If the music in the Dripstone Caves plays again 9 minutes later, this lockout will not refresh. Instead, the lockout will simply continue expiring, and now there will be only 25 minutes remaining until the lockout ends. This is for those who did not understand how the lockout works!**

</details>







> **The music for these biomes has been changed. C418's SoundTracks will play very rarely in these biomes. This is done so that the main SoundTracks of these biomes play more often. The main SoundTracks are ![4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a91ee7ccc282bc8a3c8ff3803bb42c950603fe73.png)Stand Tall, ![4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a91ee7ccc282bc8a3c8ff3803bb42c950603fe73.png)Wending, ![2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b44dd5e4f46b492080229d62ef4e4872bbfa889a.png)Endless, ![2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b44dd5e4f46b492080229d62ef4e4872bbfa889a.png)Eld Unknown, ![2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b44dd5e4f46b492080229d62ef4e4872bbfa889a.png)Pokopoko and other music. This will allow players to hear the soundtracks of Lena Raine and other composers in these biomes — SoundTracks that have existed in Minecraft, but that players have either never heard or have heard very rarely. Visiting mountain and cave biomes will become more fun!**

****

> **For versions below 1.21.6 (1.21.5-1.20.1), the most important and useful mod features for these versions have been added.**
> 
> **1. Mod V1.0.3 As in version 1.21.6, Music Frequency has been added to the music settings.**
> 
> **Music Frequency: Default - music plays every 20 minutes.**
> 
> **Music Frequency: Frequent - music plays every 10 minutes.**
> 
> **Music Frequency: Constant - music plays every 10 seconds.**
> 
> ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/97fc39e8e6c63176df68aba98bc0a96aab3a6bc9.png)
> **2. Mod V1.0.2 Music continues playing when the game is paused.**
> 
> **3. Mod V1.0.2 If you turn the music off and then turn it back on, it will continue playing > and will not disappear.**
> 
> **4. Mod V1.0.2 Upon each world entry, the music will always start playing within 2–5 seconds.**
> 
> **5. Mod V1.0.3 In the main menu, music plays continuously.**
> 
**The author will be releasing the mod for different versions of Minecraft. It just needs time. The author will try his best to upload mods for almost all mod loaders and versions from the beginning of Minecraft version 1.21 and 1.20!**

> **Now in the Badlands biome, there is a sound event for the Mountainous Badlands. This is because mountains generate in the Badlands biome, but in vanilla Minecraft, these mountains don't have their own SoundEvent. This mod adds it. The SoundEvent plays if a mountain in the Badlands is above Y-level 150.**
